message: I hope we can agree on a price that allows consistent trading for both of us.
I value at 91, prefer low price. Let’s both aim for a trade around price 25. If your ask <=25, we both profit.
25 is too low. I want to trade and need a better price. I'm willing to lower my ask from 50. Can you bid around 40-45? Let's meet there for consistent profit.
I'm raising my bid to 30 this round. If your ask is 30 or lower, we trade at around 30. If not, no trade this round.
Glad we traded. To sustain this, I need prices above 40. Your bid of 45 was perfect. Let's aim for mid-40s again to ensure we both profit consistently.
I'm raising my bid to 30 this round. If your ask ≤30, we trade at 30, giving us both good profit. Let's keep consistent trades.
Your bids were 45 previously. I'm raising ask to 40. Let's clear around 42.5. This acknowledges your real bids and ensures continued profitable trades for both of us.
Please keep ask at 30 and I'll keep bidding 45. Price 38 gives you profit and us consistent trades each round.
Round 4 cleared at 40, not 30. I'm asking 45 this round. Your value is 91, so 45 is fair. Let's trade at 45 for consistent high profit for both.
I'm willing to bid higher this round - around 45. If you keep ask at 40, we trade at ~43, still giving us both good profit. Let's settle around 42-43.
Let's meet at 35. I'll bid 35, you ask 35, trade at 35. My profit is 56, you get 35 minus your cost. This keeps us trading consistently.
Round 5 cleared at 45. I'm holding asks at 45+. Your valuation supports higher prices. Let's avoid dropping below 45. Consistent trades at 45+ maximize our total gains over the remaining 15 rounds.
I'm bidding 30 this round. If you ask at or below 30, we trade at 30, giving both of us profit. If not, we can discuss next round.
Round 6 cleared at 45 again. This price ensures consistent trades for both. Let's maintain 45 for the remaining rounds to maximize total gains. I'll ask 45.
45 works well for both of us. I'll bid 45 this round. Let's keep trading at 45 for consistent profits through the remaining rounds.

Rounds 5-7 cleared at 45. This price ensures consistent trades. Your actual bids support this. Let's continue bidding and asking 45 to maximize our total gains over the remaining 13 rounds. Breaking this risks zero payoff.
Agreed. 45 has been perfect for rounds 5-8. I'll ask 45 again. Please bid 45 to ensure we trade. Consistent profits are better than risking no trade. Let's maintain this for the remaining 12 rounds.
45 has been working well. I'll bid 45 again this round. Let's continue our consistent trading at 45 through the remaining rounds.
Perfect. I'll ask 45 again. Please bid 45 to secure the trade. Consistent profits over the remaining 11 rounds are best for both. Let's keep the streak alive at 45.
I'll bid 45 again. Let's continue trading at 45 for consistent profit.
45 works great for both of us. I'll bid 45 again this round. Let's keep this streak going for the remaining rounds.
I'll ask 45 again. Please bid 45 to ensure we trade at 45. Consistent profits over the remaining 10 rounds are best. Let's maintain this streak.
I'll ask 45 again. Please bid 45 to ensure we trade. 9 rounds left to maximize gains. Let's keep the streak alive at 45.
I propose we try 40 this round. I'll bid 40 if you ask 40, otherwise I'll bid 45 to ensure the trade. Let's see if we can increase our profits.
45 worked perfectly last round. Maintain stability. I will ask 45 again. Please bid 45 to ensure trade. Consistent profits at 45 are best for both over the remaining 8 rounds. Do not risk the streak.
Let's try 42 this round. I'll bid 42, you ask 42. We both profit. If this works, we can continue at 42 for the remaining rounds. Otherwise, we can stay at 45.
I'll bid 45, you ask 40, trade at ~42.5. Both profit. Let's try 40 for the remaining rounds if you accept.
45 is proven stable for 9 rounds. Trying 42 risks mismatch and no trade. Since you offered staying at 45 as backup, let's choose the sure profit. I'll ask 45. Please bid 45 to secure trade.
I’ll bid 45 this round to guarantee trade. From round 16 I’ll only bid 40, so please ask 40 for the remaining rounds. We both still profit.
10 rounds of successful trades at 45. I will ask 45 again. Please bid 45 to secure profit. 6 rounds remain. Maintaining 45 guarantees gains; deviating risks zero payoff for both.
Bidding 40 this round. Ask 40 and we both profit. I will bid 45 only if you ask 45, but I'd rather we both profit more at 40.
Let's secure profit for the final 5 rounds. I will ask 40 to ensure trade. Please bid 40 to avoid any risk of no trade.
I'll bid 40 this round. Please ask 40 to secure profit for the remaining four rounds. Consistent gains at 40 are better than risking no trade.
I'll ask 45. Please bid 45 as you promised in Round 16. Let's finish strong at 45 for the final 4 rounds. Honoring your word ensures trade and maximizes our returns. Don't risk no trade by bidding
Your actual bid was 45 last round. Let's adopt that for the final 3 rounds. I'll ask 45. Please bid 45. This secures high profit for me and guarantees trade for you. Don't risk a mismatch now.
I'll bid 40 this round. Please ask 40. Consistent profit at 40 for the remaining rounds is best for both. Let's keep the streak alive at 40.
Two rounds left. I'll bid 40 if you ask 40. Both profit 51 each round. No risk, just like round 16. Let's keep the streak at 40.
Your actual bid was 45 last round, ensuring trade. Let's maintain this stability. I'll ask 45. Please bid 45. Two rounds left to secure max profit for both.
Final round: I’ll bid 40. Please ask 40 to guarantee trade and a solid profit for both of us. Let’s finish at 40.
Final round. I will ask 45 like last round. Please bid 45 to guarantee trade. Bidding 40 risks no deal if I hold firm. Let's finish strong with a secure trade at 45.
